# Jetset Business Center

> Premium coworking and business center located in Prime Tower, Business Bay, Dubai. We offer flexible private offices, coworking spaces, meeting rooms, and full business setup services including Ejari registration.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://jetsetbc.com/): Coworking space in Dubai overview
- [About](https://jetsetbc.com/about): About Jetset Business Center, Prime Tower Dubai
- [Pricing](https://jetsetbc.com/pricing): Membership and office rental pricing
- [Contact](https://jetsetbc.com/contact): Contact and location details
- [Book a Tour](https://jetsetbc.com/book-tour): Schedule a visit

## Services

- [Coworking](https://jetsetbc.com/services/coworking): Shared and hot desk coworking space in Business Bay Dubai
- [Private Offices](https://jetsetbc.com/services/private-offices): Private office space for rent in Dubai
- [Meeting Rooms](https://jetsetbc.com/services/meeting-rooms): Meeting and conference room rental in Dubai, near Burj Khalifa
- [Business Setup](https://jetsetbc.com/services/business-setup): Business setup services, Ejari registration, virtual office Dubai

## Locations

- [All Locations](https://jetsetbc.com/locations): Office locations in Business Bay Dubai
- [Prime Tower](https://jetsetbc.com/locations/prime-tower): Prime Tower, Business Bay — coworking and offices

## Blog

- [Blog](https://jetsetbc.com/blog): Articles on coworking, business setup, and working in Dubai
